summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations planned. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined individually; non-security PRs are kept for maintainer review or related follow-up because merge, fix, and low-signal closeout are disabled by job frontmatter.

actions.reason: Useful active PR with maintainer-review and check context; no close, merge, or fix action is permitted in this plan shard.
Non-security PR is related to a routed security issue and has a useful focused fix, but merge/fix actions are blocked and central security handling must own the linked security report.
Approval-boundary PR is out of scope for ProjectClownfish cleanup and should go to central OpenClaw security handling.
Focused candidate fix for a linked open issue, but post-merge/fixed-by closure and merge are not allowed in this plan shard.
Small active hardening/test PR with sufficient proof, but no merge action is allowed and there is no duplicate/supersession basis for closeout.
Useful focused candidate fix for a linked open issue; keep for maintainer review because merge and fixed-by closeout are blocked in plan mode.
Discord read-authorization change with security-boundary labels and security scanner finding must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.
Related competing Windows gateway normalization PR, but failing checks and overlapping #90512 prevent closure/merge recommendation without maintainer judgment.
Useful partial fix path for a closed but historically relevant report; keep related because merge and post-merge closeout are disabled.
Follow-up PR to a landed mention-pattern policy change, not a duplicate of the closed canonical; failing proof blocks merge but not non-mutating related classification.

needs_human: Choose the canonical path between overlapping Windows gateway Scheduled Task PRs #90502 and #90512 if this cluster is later allowed to close/supersede or merge one of them.
Central OpenClaw security handling is needed for #81864 and #90511; linked security issue #89607 also remains central-security-only.
